question: How can you adjust the height of cut for a lawn mower with an electric deck lift?
content:
1. Push up on the deck-lift switch to raise the mower deck; push down on the same switch to lower it.<PIC>
2. Choose the hole in the height-of-cut bracket that matches the desired cutting height, then insert the height-of-cut pin in that hole.<PIC>
3. Whenever you change the height of cut, adjust the anti-scalp rollers.

Choose the hole in the height-of-cut bracket that matches the desired cutting height, then insert the height-of-cut pin in that hole.<PIC>\n3. Whenever you change the height of cut, adjust the anti-scalp rollers.",["Manual23_55", "Manual23_56"]

evidence_refs.note: Electric deck lift procedure: push up on deck-lift switch, select height-of-cut bracket hole, insert pin; Figures 31 and 32 identify the switch and pin/bracket.
Anti-scalp rollers should be adjusted whenever height of cut changes.

notes: Answer uses the electric deck lift section and includes only images directly tied to the switch and height-of-cut pin/bracket.
